(Translated by Google)
$3000 to fill the tank and they don't even clean your windshield!!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención las 24 hs. Baños muy limpios. Buena atención para un rico desayuno, rápido almuerzo o pasar un rato compartiendo café o algo con amigos o familia. También para realizar una entrevista personal con alguien...Muy buena atención....

(Translated by Google)
Excellent 24-hour service. Very clean restrooms. Great for a delicious breakfast, a quick lunch, or just hanging out with coffee or something to drink with friends or family. Also good for conducting a one-on-one interview...Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2561952699267032562/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJekphTHVBRRAB
